node.statement: STEP: In large-t limit, F has two contributions: (i) all-e bulk → d^{-N} (cost of top s-vs-e interface), (ii) all-s bulk → F̃ (depends on accumulated circuit noise). Define f_2 = -(2/N)log_d(F̃) where F̃ = F - d^{-N}. This f_2 measures effective errors per qudit. [Eq.(17), main.tex line 254]
